/* ツールチップ */
.tm1_pt1 .header-subnav-item {
  position: relative;
  overflow: visible;
}

/* 吹き出し本体 */
.tm1_pt1 .header-subnav-item::after {
  content: attr(data-tooltip);
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 12px);   
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -10px); 

  background: #9f9f9f;/* ←吹き出しフレームの色*/
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 12px;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  white-space: nowrap;

  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
  width: 122px;
  text-align: center;
}

/* 三角（上向き） */
.tm1_pt1 .header-subnav-item::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%; 
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -10px);

  border-width: 6px;
  border-style: solid;
  border-color: transparent transparent #9f9f9f transparent;/* ← 三角の色 */

  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
}

/* hover */
@media (hover: hover) {
  .header-subnav-item:hover::after,
.tm1_pt1   .header-subnav-item:hover::before {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate(-50%, 0);
  }
}
/* スマホではツールチップを非表示 */
@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
  .header-subnav-item::after,
.tm1_pt1   .header-subnav-item::before {
    display: none;
  }

$(function () {
  if(window.innerWidth > 767) {
    $(".header-nav-item.has-sub").hover(function() {
      $(this).find(".header-megamenu").stop().fadeIn("fast");
      $(".header-search").stop().fadeOut("fast");
    }, function() {
      $(this).find(".header-megamenu").stop().fadeOut("fast");
    });
  } else {
    var state = false;
    var scrollpos = 0;
    $(".header-nav-btn").on("click", function() {
      if(state == false) {
        scrollpos = $(window).scrollTop();
        $("html").css("scroll-behavior", "auto");
        $("body").addClass("is-fixed").css({
          "top": -scrollpos
        });
        state = true;
      } else {
        $("body").removeClass("is-fixed");
        setTimeout(function() {
          $("html").css("scroll-behavior", "smooth");
        }, 100);
        $("body, html").delay(10).animate({
          scrollTop: scrollpos
        }, 0);
        state = false;
      }
      $(".header-nav").slideToggle("fast");
      $(this).toggleClass("is-open");
    });
    $(".header-megamenu").hide();
    $(".header-nav-item.has-sub > a").on("click", function() {
      $(this).next().slideToggle("fast");
      $(this).toggleClass("is-open");
      return false
    });
  }
});

$(function() {
  $('.case-tab-item:first').addClass('is-active');
  $('.case-contents:first').addClass('is-active');
  var swipers = [];
  $('.case-contents').each(function(index, element) {
    var slidesCount = $(element).find('.swiper-slide').length;
    if(window.innerWidth > 767) {
      if (slidesCount <= 4) {
        $(element).addClass('no-swiper');
        return;
      }
    } else {
      if (slidesCount <= 1) {
        $(element).addClass('no-swiper');
        return;
      }
    }
    var swiper = new Swiper(element, {
      loop: true,
      slidesPerView: 1.2,
      centeredSlides: true,
      speed: 1000,
      autoplay: {
        delay: 4000,
        disableOnInteraction: false,
      },
      navigation: {
        nextEl: $(element).find('.swiper-button-next')[0],
        prevEl: $(element).find('.swiper-button-prev')[0],
      },
      pagination: {
        el: $(element).find('.swiper-pagination')[0],
        clickable: true,
      },
      breakpoints: {
        768: {
          slidesPerView: 'auto',
          centeredSlides: false
        }
      }
    });
    swipers.push(swiper);
  });
  $('.case-contents').each(function() {
    $(this).appendTo('.case');
  });
  $('.case-tab-item').on('click', function() {
    $('.case-tab-item').removeClass('is-active');
    $('.case-contents').removeClass('is-active');
    $(this).addClass('is-active');
    var target = $(this).data('target');
    $('#' + target).addClass('is-active');
    var targetSwiper = swipers[$('.case-contents').index($('#' + target))];
    swipers.forEach(function(swiper) {
      swiper.init();
    });
  });
});

let kvEnd = 0;
let footerTop = 0;
const SHOW_OFFSET = 200; // 表示タイミングの調整
let ctaClosed = false;   // ← ここで閉じた状態を管理

$(window).on("load resize", function () {
  const $kv = $(".kv-copy");
  kvEnd = $kv.offset().top + $kv.outerHeight();
  footerTop = $(".footer").offset().top;
});

$(window).on("scroll", function () {
  if (ctaClosed) return; // 閉じたら何もしない

  const st = $(window).scrollTop();
  const windowH = $(window).height();
  const scrollBottom = st + windowH;

  if (scrollBottom > kvEnd && scrollBottom < footerTop - 360) {
    $(".fixed-cta").addClass("is-show");
  } else {
    $(".fixed-cta").removeClass("is-show");
  }
});

// 閉じるボタン
$(document).on("click", ".fixed-cta-close", function () {
  var $cta = $(this).closest(".fixed-cta");
  ctaClosed = true; // ← これを追加！

  if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 767px)").matches) {
    // スマホ：クラスを外して非表示に
    $cta.removeClass("is-show");
  } else {
    // PC：アニメーションで右にスライドして非表示に
    $cta.animate({ right: "-140vw" }, 500);
  }
});
</script>
